evidence_ledger.allowed_wording: The current public RankingScorer combines 22 named Phoenix score terms.
The public RankingScorer reads score-term weights from runtime feature-switch parameters.
The bounded public snapshot does not establish the exact live numeric values.

hooks.text: The useful lesson in the public For You code is its boundary: 22 named score terms, runtime parameters, and no established live numeric table.

variants.text: The public RankingScorer combines 22 named score terms and loads their weights from runtime feature-switch parameters. The bounded snapshot does not establish the live numeric values. Read the source for the boundary—not a production scorecard.

assertions.text: The public RankingScorer combines 22 named Phoenix score terms.
The scorer loads those weights from runtime feature-switch parameters.
The bounded snapshot does not establish their live numeric values.

action_affordances: Compare public code claims against their cited scope

risks: Readers may mistake the named score terms for a complete description of production ranking.
mitigations: State the public-versus-production boundary in the same post.

variants.text: Twenty-two named score terms are visible in the public RankingScorer. Their weights come from runtime parameters. Their live numeric values are not established by this snapshot. Useful evidence, with a hard limit.

assertions.text: Twenty-two named score terms are visible in the public RankingScorer.
Their weights come from runtime parameters.
Their live numeric values are not established by this snapshot.

action_affordances: Invite readers to distinguish public evidence from production speculation

risks: The concise opening could be read as dismissing the rest of the public architecture.
mitigations: Describe the claim as a bounded finding about RankingScorer.

assumptions.text: The intended audience values source-linked technical claims over unsupported ranking folklore.

launch_plan.timing_rationale: Publish during an active engineering discussion about public ranking-source interpretation.
launch_plan.reply_handling: Answer substantive questions with the cited claim IDs and state the public-versus-production boundary.

measurement_plan.baseline: Compare discussion quality with recent evidence-led technical posts of similar length.
measurement_plan.causal_limit: Observed engagement does not establish an algorithmic effect or predict future distribution.

limitations: Public source cannot deterministically score content because live weights, user context, production models, and experiments are unavailable.
The public RankingScorer evidence does not establish production-model equivalence.
